title: バンブーの倍々1日1善週間

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Bamboo Memory and Mejiro Ardan one
day while I'm passing by the dorms.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you again for helping me move all these
books. You're a real lifesaver. I shouldn't have
borrowed so many.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
It was no problem at all! You can come to me any
time you need help!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! Good morning!
choice_data_list: It's so nice how you help everyone.
It's so nice how you help everyone.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Aw, thanks! But the day's just getting started! I'm
going to help out loads more!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
After all... I'm planning on doing sixty-four good
deeds today!
choice_data_list: Isn't one good deed a day enough?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's how it started, but then I started doubling
it! Two, four, eight! ...Sixteen! Um... thirty-two?
Yeah, thirty-two!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
So, uh, uhhh... anyway! Sixty-four after a week!
Wouldn't it be cool if I could pull it off? Not to
mention awesome!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I have to hurry or I won't be able to finish in
time! See you later!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She leaves before I can stop her, so I can only
look on with concern.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later that evening, I find Bamboo Memory on the
track.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for all the trouble, Bamboo! Thanks for
helpin' me pass all that stuff out to the younger
students!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: No worries! I'm glad to be of help!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I can always count on you. Y'know, I've
heard you've been extra helpful recently.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Not that I don't 'preciate it, but isn't it tough?
Since you're always helpin' me out, I'll lend a hand
if you want!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...I'm okay! I appreciate the offer, but this is
something I'd like to do on my own!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
When I became the chair of the disciplinary
committee, my father gave me a talk about the
resolve you need to maintain order and discipline.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo's Father
text_block_list.text:
So you've become the disciplinary committee
chair? Nicely done! Here's a piece of advice that
I've learned from teaching.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo's Father
text_block_list.text:
The first thing to know about keeping everyone in
line is... you need to be the coolest person
around!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo's Father
text_block_list.text:
Anyone with a bit of nerve can yell at people
when they're misbehaving, but you're not going
to change many hearts that way.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo's Father
text_block_list.text:
That's why you have to be a role model if you
really want to keep order. You've got to be so
cool that everyone wants to be like you!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I see! That way, everyone will follow the rules all
by themselves!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ever since then, I've been trying to think up some
special training I can do right away to become a
role model.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Going to bed and waking up early all year round,
keeping the bathroom spotless, chewing every
bite of food twenty times... and now, my week of
doubling good deeds!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I got the idea from a show I watched way back,
where a character said, "Always strive to be
better than you were yesterday." It's the best
training I've ever done!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And out of my goal of sixty-four, this makes
sixty-three! Just one more to go!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ah... So that's why you've been workin' so hard.
Guess it'd be rude if I got in your way.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Well then, get out there and finish it yourself! Do
that and I reckon you'll be a great role model!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Right! I appreciate it!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, Trainer! You caught me with just one good
deed left to go!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But the thing is, I've already helped everyone at
the academy. I've only got one good deed left,
but I don't know if I can find anyone who needs
anything.
choice_data_list: Can you do a good deed with no recipient?
Can you do a good deed with no recipient?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...!
That's right! I never thought about that! A good
deed can still be good even if it doesn't help
someone!
choice_data_list: Then, the answer is to do something cool.
Then, the answer is to do something cool.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Something cool... What's the coolest thing I could
do as a role model for the other students?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I've got it! Training! Red-hot training!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right! This one is gonna bring it home! What
kind of training should I do for my final good
deed?!
choice_data_list: Follow your heart and pump some iron!
How about a good ole run?
How about a good ole run?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right! This one is gonna bring it home! What
kind of training should I do for my final good
deed?!
choice_data_list: Follow your heart and pump some iron!
How about a good ole run?
How about a good ole run?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Right on! I'm gonna turn every inch of flesh
into cold-hard steel!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hyah! Hyah! ...HYAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Nearby Student
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! That's some workout! She's going so hard,
she's shaking the building!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory successfully achieves her goal
and becomes a real role model for the students of
Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'll show the whole academy what an
amazing run looks like!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
RAAAH! I'll finish things off with sixty-four full
speed laps!

text_block_list.name: Nearby Student
text_block_list.text:
What an intense run!
Hey, everyone! Are we just gonna sit back and be
outdone?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... I gave it everything I had! I managed to hold out till the very end, even with the others hot on my heels!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory successfully achieves her goal
and becomes a real role model for the students of
Tracen Academy.
